issues.detail: The skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases for every task.

scenarios.name: retry-task-with-exponential-backoff
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets most rubric items (correct countdown and retry call) but has an incorrect max_retries value, whereas Response B fails on several key points including the countdown formula and default_retry_delay.

scenarios.name: chain-three-tasks
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not provide any tasks or chain.
